tags: Natural polymer systems for personal care

product_highlights: Bermocoll™ cellulose ethers — excellent thickening and film-forming across wide pH range
Amaze™ biopolymer film former — sustainable naturally derived alternative to synthetic film formers
Specialty rheology modifier portfolio for diverse formulation types
notes: Nouryon's personal care division offers a range of sustainable texture-modifying ingredients based on cellulose chemistry and biopolymers. Their Bermocoll™ cellulose ether range provides excellent thickening, film-forming, and texture-modifying performance across a wide range of pH values and formulation types. Nouryon's Amaze™ biopolymer film former is a sustainable, naturally derived alternative to synthetic film formers, delivering excellent hold and texture with a clean ingredient profile.
